message:
fix: code review fixes for event coalescing and input parsing

- Add scroll_preserves_position test to verify position tracking
- Fix format string in input_parser consecutive_pastes test (use {i} not {{i}})
- Move test-only imports to test module in terminal_session.rs
- Keep map_key_code pub(crate) for test access
- Incorporate concurrent work: map_crossterm_event_internal rename

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
